title: Alzheimer's disease current therapies, novel drug delivery systems and future directions for better disease management
source: Singh et al., Journal of Controlled Release, 2024

L2: Novel drug delivery systems including nanoparticles and liposomes improve brain targeting for AD therapies
Review covers FDA-approved drugs and emerging formulation strategies for Alzheimer's treatment
L3: Overview of Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis, current FDA-approved treatments, and innovative drug delivery strategies including nanoparticulate systems, liposomes, and intranasal delivery routes for improved brain bioavailability
